description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Use the services section to request a proposal for a streetscape and public realm project with a budget between $150,000–$250,000 starting in September 2025, including the specified corridor redesign description and your contact details, and submit the inquiry form.

expected_values.project_description: Redesign of a 2 km main street to add protected bike lanes, traffic calming, and two new public plazas.

tasks.instruction: From the case studies, save a transit-oriented development project in North America with 150–300 residential units and at least 1 hectare of public space to your shortlist or favorites, then open it from that saved list.

tasks.instruction: Find an article about the 15-minute city concept published after January 1, 2023 with a reading time under 10 minutes, save it to your reading list, then reopen it from that list.

target_names: From Concept to Block: Delivering the 15-Minute City in Existing Neighborhoods

tasks.instruction: Use the project cost estimator to configure a 40-hectare brownfield regeneration masterplan in Europe including concept and schematic design, then proceed to the contact step with the cheapest suggested package whose total fee is at or below $350,000 selected.

tasks.instruction: Register for the earliest community engagement webinar scheduled between May 1 and August 31, 2026 that starts after 2:00 PM, completing the registration form with the provided participant details.

target_names: Designing Better Conversations: Community Engagement for Urban Projects

tasks.instruction: From the team directory, find an urban designer specializing in transit or mobility with at least 10 years of experience and submit a meeting request form for a 30-minute introductory call with them on a specific date and time using the given contact details.

tasks.instruction: In the resources library, open a tactical urbanism toolkit or guide published in 2022 or later with at least 20 pages, add the specified review note to it, save the note, and then open the PDF.

target_names: Tactical Urbanism Toolkit: From Parklets to Plazas (2024 Edition)
Quick Guide to Tactical Urbanism Pilots

expected_values.note_text: Review this tactical urbanism toolkit for temporary plaza pilot.

tasks.instruction: In the careers section, submit an online application (without uploading any files) for an Urban Planner role based in New York that requires 3–5 years of experience, filling in the form fields with the provided contact information, experience selection, cover letter text, and portfolio URL.

expected_values.cover_letter: I am an urban planner with 4 years of experience in zoning analysis and community-focused land use planning.

tasks.instruction: Use the contact and offices pages to reach the Berlin office by submitting a contact form for an in-person workshop in October 2025 that includes the office’s phone number in the message along with your name and email.

expected_values.message_intro: I would like to schedule an in-person urban design workshop in Berlin in October 2025.
